privileged_info_summary: The create_job_position task operates on Odoo 17 Community Edition (version 17.0-20260217) running at http://localhost:8069 with admin/admin credentials. The task uses Odoo's official demo data with 20 pre-loaded employees and 7 departments. The job position to create ('Data Scientist') does not exist in the demo data's 7 existing job positions (CEO, CTO, Consultant, Experienced Developer, HR Manager, Marketing Manager, Trainee). The target department ('Research & Development') exists in the demo data. Task configuration: 240-second timeout, 30 maximum steps, sparse reward. The difficulty is rated 'easy' based on the minimal form interactions required (filling 2-3 fields on a standard form and saving). Data is non-synthetic (official Odoo demo data).
